messages.content: Todo 2.3缺口: lc_complete缺predecessor/follower, fallback_reason只有zone_c_chain_incomplete, match_rate只查predecessor, cross_merge replan=0, merge_history缺lead/follow
6项: merge_history加lead/follow, lc_complete填充, fallback_reason, replan修正, match_rate加follower, 测试
FIX-1 FLAG(last_eval超时重试后可能stale). FIX-2 REJECT(merge_history可能缺失+语义不等价). FIX-3 FLAG(缓存is_fallback). FIX-4 FLAG(语义需明确). FIX-5 FLAG(空target跳过). FIX-6 APPROVE.
FIX-1 FLAG(命名为gap_lead/follow区分). FIX-2 FLAG(缺失时fallback). FIX-3 APPROVE. FIX-4 FLAG(语义). FIX-5 APPROVE. **Q2 CONTRACT_SMOKE_SUMMARY REJECT**(阻断性缺陷,PROPOSAL未涉及).
FIX-2 **REJECT**(L1 gap邻居≠通过序前车,同字段不同语义致概念坍塌). FIX-4 **REJECT**(全局replan假阳性). FIX-1 FLAG(SEARCHING到MERGED时间漂移). FIX-5 FLAG(空target跳过).

VOTE(8项): FIX-1 merge_history加gap_lead_id+gap_follow_id; FIX-2改 lc_complete填gap邻居(match_rate仅用cross_merge不受影响); FIX-3 fallback_reason='position_fallback'; FIX-4 cross_merge replan_required=plan_recomputed(时序标志非因果); FIX-5 match_rate加follower(空target跳过); FIX-6 CONTRACT_SMOKE_SUMMARY(Sonnet REJECT); FIX-7 测试; 文档: 同一字段不同事件含义不同已在anchor语义文档中说明
